name: @pickle-pee/genesis-cli
description: CLI entry point, argument parsing, and mode routing

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "require('node:fs').chmodSync('dist/main.js', 0o755)"
